ABOUT
自己紹介 The Builder
Behind The Code

I'm Anshuman — a 16-year-old full-stack engineer and co-founder of Books, Coffee and Dreams. I live in Kota, India and build production-depth software under hackathon deadlines. My work spans AI agents, game engines, safety apps, and ARGs — always chasing something that hasn't been made before.

Currently deep in building The Living Conspiracy — a 14-chapter community-driven mystery ARG for Reddit's hackathon. Previously won 3 tracks at DeveloperWeek NYC 2026 with Signal.repair.

🎮 Game Dev 🤖 AI / Multi-Agent ⚡ Full-Stack 🏆 3× Hackathon Winner 📍 Kota, India ☕ Coffee Powered 🌿 Ghibli Fan 🎯 Grade 10

PROJECTS
プロジェクト Things I've Built
THE LIVING CONSPIRACY — "THE BLACK SIGNAL" 🔴 ACTIVE BUILD

Community-driven detective ARG for the Reddit Games with a Hook Hackathon (Jul 15 deadline). 14-chapter mystery with real-time community voting, cryptographic clues, multi-player narrative engine. Players collectively solve "The Black Signal" — a mystery woven across Reddit posts, encoded messages and branching chapter outcomes determined by community choices.

DevvitPhaser 3HonoRedis KVTypeScriptWebSockets
GitHub ⌛ In Progress
SIGNAL.REPAIR 🏆 3× WINNER

Multi-agent claim verification platform. 3-LLM consensus engine (Groq), real-time web intelligence via Nimble & Tavily. Won Overall Winner, Tower Pipeline Challenge, and Nimble Challenge at DeveloperWeek NYC 2026.

GroqReact/TSFastAPINimbleTower
GitHub
SHIELDHER ✅ SHIPPED

Women's safety PWA — one-tap SOS via Twilio SMS/WhatsApp, live GPS tracking (Supabase Realtime), Mapbox GL journey mode, fake call feature, AI safety companion, encrypted incident journal. Offline emergency numbers for 130+ countries.

Next.js 14PWASupabaseTwilioClaude APIMapbox
GitHub
GUARDIAN OPS ✅ SHIPPED

Splunk Agentic Ops submission — 3-agent AI pipeline (Triage → Response → Audit) extending ShieldHer with a 6-panel SOC dashboard. Built under zero-budget constraint using Groq free tier, Supabase Edge Functions, and Cloudflare Tunnel.

Groq llama-3.3Splunk MCPSupabase EdgeCloudflare
GitHub
STUDYMIND AGENT ✅ SHIPPED

AI-powered study agent with SM-2 spaced repetition algorithm, multiple AI teaching modes (Socratic, Direct, Quiz), Knowledge Graph visualization, and cross-device auth. Gemini 2.5 Flash backend.

PythonFlaskMongoDB AtlasGemini 2.5SM-2
GitHub
LABA + CREATIVE BUILDS ✅ VARIOUS

Local Autonomous Browser Agent in pure vanilla JS (no external APIs), browser-based racing game with physics engine and procedural audio, GitHub README widget with orbital tech stack visualization, lofi study website with functional modules.

Vanilla JSCanvas APIWeb AudioPure CSS

PHILOSOPHY
哲学 How I Think
// nature always reclaims what you neglect — ship or it rusts
// HELLO!! ARE YOU HERE?? MAYBE... — the internet never left
// great things are built together · NICE! · HI ALL! · ART!
"Build things that feel genuinely original. Not another todo app. Not another dashboard. Something that makes people stop and go — wait, how?"
01

Zero budget, maximum depth

Every project built on free tiers, open APIs, and browser-native capabilities. Constraints breed creativity.

02

Ship under pressure

Hackathon deadlines are a feature, not a bug. The best code I've written was with 6 hours on the clock.

03

Nature reclaims what you neglect

Like the overgrown keyboard — abandon a project and the forest takes it. Keep pushing commits.

04

Community is the product

The Living Conspiracy isn't a game I built — it's a world the community inhabits. Build for people, not portfolios.

05

Grade 10 is not a limitation

DeveloperWeek NYC didn't ask my age. The code did the talking. It always does.
